title: feat: add Amazon Nova model family
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: A Nova in the garden
gist.blurb: We just planted the entire Amazon Nova model family in the garden. Text, images, and video generation are all blooming with new cosmic possibilities.
gist.summary: Added the Amazon Nova model family to the API, bringing Nova Pro for text, Nova Canvas for images, and Nova Reel for video generation.
gist.impact: Developers can now access Amazon's latest multimodal Nova models for text, image, and video generation through our standard endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: Space/cosmic theme mixed with the cozy garden to represent 'Nova'. The bee mascot looking through a telescope at a glowing star (Nova), with the monitor robot holding a star chart.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot looking through a retro telescope at a glowing pastel supernova in the night sky. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a star chart, screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft lavender and mint gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
